how_it_works: Cluster Jewels slot into the outer jewel sockets on the passive tree, adding a new branch of passives. Large Cluster Jewels add 8-12 passive points including 2-3 notable passives and 1 jewel socket. Medium Cluster Jewels add 4-6 passives including 2 notables. Small Cluster Jewels add 2-4 passives including 1 notable. The enchant on the jewel determines which notables are available.
tips: Voices (Large, 2 jewel sockets) is the most powerful large cluster for aura stacking — it adds medium cluster sockets instead of notables
Always check the number of passives on a cluster jewel — fewer passives means less points spent pathing to notables
Medium clusters can be chained from Large cluster jewel sockets, enabling deep cluster configurations

jewels.name: Voices
jewels.enchant: Adds 2 Passive Skills to Jewel Sockets
best_for: Any build needing 3+ medium cluster notables
jewels.notes: The most powerful large cluster. Enables stacking multiple medium cluster jewels. Sought by aura stackers and many meta builds.

jewels.name: Battle-Hardened
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 12% increased Physical Damage
jewels.notes: Martial Prowess is top-tier (+3 maximum of each charge type). Calamitous adds 40% more damage if you've warcried recently.

jewels.name: Towering Threat
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 12% increased Attack Damage
jewels.notes: Fuel the Fight restores rage on warcry. Pair with Warchief or Stampede.

jewels.name: Cremator
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 12% increased Fire Damage
jewels.notes: Prismatic Heart adds all-res. Burning Bright and From the Ashes scale ignite proliferation.

jewels.name: Cold to the Core
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 12% increased Cold Damage
jewels.notes: Widespread Destruction adds AoE radius. Blanketed Snow scales chill effect.

jewels.name: Surging Vitality
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 12% increased Life
jewels.notes: Vivid Hues provides status effect immunity during flasks. Good defensive cluster.

jewels.name: Empowered Elements
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 12% increased Elemental Damage
jewels.notes: Prismatic Heart adds all-resistances. Disorienting Display Dazes enemies on elemental hit.

jewels.name: Minion Instability Path
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 12% increased Minion Damage
jewels.notes: Renewal is key for minion regeneration. Hulking Corpses improves Raise Spectre HP.

jewels.name: Flow of Life
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 10% increased Life Regeneration Rate
jewels.notes: Blessed Rebirth: minions revive with 20% life. Life from Death: recover life on enemy death. Core for RF builds.

jewels.name: Storm Drinker
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 10% increased Lightning Damage
jewels.notes: Scintillating Idea: gain mana as energy shield. Lightning Rod: 50% chance to gain power charge on shock.

jewels.name: Wish for Death
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 10% increased Chaos Damage
jewels.notes: Vile Reinvigoration: recover ES on chaos kill. Dark Ideation: chaos resist and chaos skill speed.

jewels.name: Precise Commander
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills grant: 12% increased Aura Effect
jewels.notes: Purposeful Harbinger is the core notable for aura stacking — adds Herald reservation efficiency and flat stats per aura. Essential for the archetype.

jewels.name: Grand Design
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills grant: 10% reduced Mana Reservation
jewels.notes: Grand Design notable: 15% reduced reservation for non-channelling skills if you have 5+ auras. Core for high-aura-count builds.

jewels.name: One With Nothing
jewels.enchant: Adds 2 Passive Skills (Hollow Palm Technique)
jewels.notes: The keystone notable that enables Hollow Palm Technique — massive attack rating and damage when unarmoured and unarmed. Enables an entire build archetype.

jewels.name: Fettle
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 8% increased Life
jewels.notes: Fettle: 10% increased maximum life. One of the best small cluster notables for pure life-stacking.

jewels.name: Unnatural Calm
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 8% increased Energy Shield
jewels.notes: Unnatural Calm: 30% increased energy shield. Core small cluster for ES builds.

jewels.name: Self-Control
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills grant: 8% reduced Mana Reservation
jewels.notes: Self-Control: 10% reduced reservation efficiency for skills. Key for fitting all desired auras.

jewels.name: Cauldron of Horne
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 8% increased Physical Damage
jewels.notes: Cauldron of Horne: 30% more Bleed damage if enemy is already Bleeding. Core for Bleed builds.

jewels.name: Brewed for Potency
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills grant: 10% increased Flask Effect Duration
jewels.notes: Brewed for Potency: 20% increased flask effect duration. Useful for builds requiring permanent flask uptime.

jewels.name: Blessed
jewels.enchant: Added Small Passive Skills have 8% increased Damage over Time
jewels.notes: Blessed: 10% increased damage over time. Generic DoT scaler — applies to all DoT types.
